title: guzmania insignis
intro: Guzmania insignis, commonly known as the Queen's Tears or Insignis Guzmania, is a species of epiphytic flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It is known for its unique, delicate white bracts and red flowers, which are often used in floral arrangements and as a decorative element. Guzmania insignis has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, and has been employed to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas and infusions that are believed to have antioxidant and immune-boosting effects, promoting overall health and well-being.
